title: salix × altobracensis
intro: Salix × altobracensis, also known as the hybrid willow, is a rare, sterile hybrid of two willow species, Salix purpurea and Salix viminalis. This plant is rich in salicin, a compound that provides its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Salix × altobracensis include relief from pain, reduction of fever, and treatment of various skin conditions, such as eczema and dermatitis. The herbal preparations of Salix × altobracensis are typically made into teas, tinctures, or ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
